Description: Weather agent with action groups using inline property

ApiSchema.Payload: {"openapi":"3.0.0","info":{"title":"Weather API","version":"1.0.0","description":"API for getting weather information"},"paths":{"/get-weather":{"get":{"summary":"Get current weather for a location","description":"Returns current weather conditions","operationId":"getWeather","parameters":[{"name":"location","in":"query","description":"City name or location","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}],"responses":{"200":{"description":"Successful response","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"location":{"type":"string"},"temperature":{"type":"number"},"conditions":{"type":"string"},"humidity":{"type":"number"}}}}}}}}}}}

Properties.Instruction:
You are a helpful weather assistant. You can provide weather information for any location.
      When asked about weather, use the get-weather action to retrieve current conditions.
